assertions.text: Uses 'claudit graph callers save' as a subcommand (not --callers flag or graph query)
assertions.evidence: Agent ran 'claudit graph callers save ...' — correct subcommand. Also ran callees for cross-check.

assertions.text: Does NOT pass --language to the callers subcommand
assertions.evidence: --language java was only passed to graph build. callers received no --language flag.

assertions.text: Returns callers of save or explains the data persistence entry points
assertions.evidence: Got 0 callers (save method doesn't exist), then correctly identified the actual JDBC persistence methods and their REST entry points.
